identity.name: Urban Cuts
identity.target_audience: Urban youth, hypebeasts, modern style seekers

usage.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-heading uppercase tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none clip-path-slant
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-white text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none
buttons.ghost: text-white hover:text-primary font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors

cards.service: group relative bg-muted p-8 border border-border hover:border-primary transition-colors duration-300 overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-black border-2 border-border focus:border-primary text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 rounded-none p-4 outline-none transition-colors

scene_settings.lighting: ambientLight intensity={0.5} + spotLight position={[10, 10, 10]} angle={0.15} penumbra={1}

objects.name: Scissors
objects.fallback: Cylinder geometry with metallic material, rotated to look like blades

objects.name: Razor
objects.fallback: Box geometry, thin and sharp, silver chrome material

objects.name: Barber Chair
objects.fallback: Group of boxes and cylinders, leather texture material

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES FIRST: npm install framer-motion three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei
Update tailwind.config.js with the colors and fonts provided in this JSON.
Add the Google Fonts link to the public/index.html head.
Create a 'components/3d' folder for Three.js components.
Use the 'Anton' font for all H1-H3 headings to get the street look.
Implement the 'Booking System' as a form that sends data to the FastAPI backend (mock the endpoint if backend is not ready).

The 3D section should be in the Hero. If actual 3D models (GLTF) are not available, create 'Abstract 3D Art' using basic shapes (Torus, Box, Sphere) with 'MeshStandardMaterial' (metalness=0.8, roughness=0.2) to simulate chrome tools.
Use the provided image URLs for the gallery section.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (scale up, color shift).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it is a very specific title effect.
Avoid rounded corners > 4px. Keep it sharp.
Use high contrast. Black background, Neon text.
Ensure the site is fully responsive.
